Colonia Citizens Network

Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3303-06-04
Freelance Report Mercury Seven Expedition Returns
The Mercury Seven expedition returns to Colonia after 96 days of deep-space exploration, with discoveries in the Orio-Persean Conflux, Wagar's Reach, and Ishtar.
3303-03-03
Freelance Report The Mercury Seven Expedition
The Mercury Seven expedition departs from Jaques Station in Colonia, inviting pilots to join a multi-stage journey through the Orio-Persean Conflux, Osprey Stellar Remnant, Wagar's Reach and Zephyrus.
3302-11-05
Freelance Report The Christmas Carriers Convoy
The Colonia Citizens Network has invited the galactic community to support Colonia by delivering food and equipment and transporting settlers as part of the Christmas Carriers Convoy. Departing on 2nd December 3302, the convoy will stop at outposts along the Colonia highway and arrive in the first week of January.
3302-11-01
Freelance Report Fungi Discovered on Airless Worlds
Fungal growths have been discovered on the airless world Colonia 3 C A in the Colonia system. Commander Alesia of the Pilots Federation recorded the first data, and mycologist Dr James Morel identified two species visually from telemetry and urged explorers to handle specimens with care.
3302-09-02
Freelance Report August Exodus Ends with a Bang
The August Exodus concluded with dozens of independent pilots gathering outside Jaques Station in Colonia for celebrations and a race on the track that would host the first official Colonia Citizens Network event.
